heading: Normal trade relations
label: 1881 Normal trade relations
text: Except as otherwise provided in this subchapter, in , or in section 401(a) of the Tariff Classification Act of 1962, any duty or other import restriction or duty-free treatment proclaimed in carrying out any trade agreement under this subchapter or shall apply to products of all foreign countries, whether imported directly or indirectly.section 1351 of this titlesection 1351 of this title
notes: References in TextSection 401(a) of the Tariff Classification Act of 1962, referred to in text, is set out as a note under .section 1351 of this title
Amendments1998— substituted existing catchline for “Most-favored-nation principle”.Pub. L. 105–206
amendments: Amendments1998— substituted existing catchline for “Most-favored-nation principle”.Pub. L. 105–206
